response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including embedded systems and C/C++, but his resume does not highlight direct experience with Linux kernel modifications, embedded networking, or security features required for LAN-switch products. His expertise leans toward web and application development, with limited evidence of embedded firmware or security-specific work. His Japanese proficiency is unconfirmed, and his English communication is likely strong but not explicitly stated as native-level.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies (Dlang, Go, etc.)
Demonstrated collaboration across teams (Altom Consulting, Optilyz) and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modifications or embedded networking (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X)
Limited evidence of security-specific work (e.g., encryption, attack detection, or tamper-proofing)
Unconfirmed native-level Japanese proficiency and minimal exposure to Japanese-speaking environments
